zh.Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franc: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達雷勒-維吉
zh.Grancey-le-Château-Neuvelle, Côte-d'Or,: 法國布格o-達格朗希勒-a奧
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Til-Chatel於大約1240年出生在法國布格o-達提爾-a特爾時，她的父親Jean de Til-Châtel27歲，母親Aluis de Vergy29歲。她於1252年與Guillaume Sire de Grancey結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年在法國布格o-達迪喬享年61歲。

zh-hans.Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franc: 法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達雷勒-維吉
zh-hans.Grancey-le-Château-Neuvelle, Côte-d'Or,: 法国布格o-達格朗希勒-a奧
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle de Til-Chatel于大约1240年出生在法国布格o-達提爾-a特爾时，她的父亲Jean de Til-Châtel27岁，母亲Aluis de Vergy29岁。她于1252年与Guillaume Sire de Grancey结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年在法国布格o-達迪喬享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Til-Chatel was born about 1240, in Til-Châtel, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, her father, Jean de Til-Châtel, was 27 and her mother, Aluis de Vergy, was 29. She married Guillaume Sire de Grancey in 1252. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1300, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Til-Chatel est née environ 1240, à Til-Châtel, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Jean de Til-Châtel, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Aluis de Vergy, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume Sire de Grancey en 1252. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1300, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Til-Chatel um 1240 in Til-Châtel, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean de Til-Châtel 27 und ihre Mutter Aluis de Vergy 29. Sie hat 1252 Guillaume Sire de Grancey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1300 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Til-Chatel è nata il circa 1240 nel Til-Châtel, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Jean de Til-Châtel, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Aluis de Vergy, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume Sire de Grancey nel 1252. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1300, nel Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Til-Chatelが約1240年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルティル-チaテルで生まれた時，父Jean de Til-Châtelは27歳，母Aluis de Vergyは29歳であった。1252年にGuillaume Sire de Granceyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルディジョンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Til-Chatel(이)가 대략 1240년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 틸-cha텔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean de Til-Châtel(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aluis de Vergy(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1252년 Guillaume Sire de Grancey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 디조에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Til-Chatel nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Til-Châtel, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Jean de Til-Châtel, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Aluis de Vergy, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume Sire de Grancey em 1252. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1300, em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Til-Chatel родилась около 1240 г. в местности тил-чaтел, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean de Til-Châtel было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Aluis de Vergy, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume Sire de Grancey в 1252 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de Til-Chatel nació aproximadamente 1240, en Til-Châtel, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Jean de Til-Châtel, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Aluis de Vergy, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Guillaume Sire de Grancey en 1252. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1300, en Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 61 años.
